calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To May-04-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Notice Of And Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Frujuice Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kristine Craig, Esq. appeared for plaintiff S.F. Centre Limited Partnership, a Delaware partnership.
Michael Chapman, Portfolio Associate at S.F. Centre Limited Partnership, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Craig and Mr. Chapman appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Frujuice Inc., a California corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Lease was filed on August 16, 2019, and personally served on defendant Frujuice Inc.'s Authorized Agent of Process on March 2, 2020.
Default as to defendant Frujuice Inc., a California corporation, was entered on June 3, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 4, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff S.F. Centre Limited Partnership, a Delaware partnership, and against the defaulted defendant Frujuice Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $382,661.42.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $422.25.

Total - $385,908.67.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
